title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Toko, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Beast Pirates as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wano country, between Kuri and upon

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: MAAAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMAMA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that so? You like

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Oshiruko too, O-TAMA?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MM! I thought my cheeks were going to fall off for real!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sweetness of the Red beans filled up the inside of my cheeks...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Riiiiiiight?! And the glim- Mering pearls of Mochi! Just like the eyeballs of a frog!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-Lin, that's a scary way to put it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: YAAH! TOOHH!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: HAAAHAHAHAHA! Really? I'm so hungry..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember between

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: I can't wait to eat Oshiruko!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: She's really amped about this Oshiruko...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What happens if she turns back into big mom when she finds out there isn't any?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll actually end up putting luffy in danger!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: UDon, Prisoner's mine

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They lost again!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: The pleasures have all been defeated, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm... That's not it! Rayleigh deflected that elephant without even touching it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He did it way more gently.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Rayleigh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Straw hat... What in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Picture yourself wearing invisible armor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The Haki he first showed me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Was crazy high-level!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If I could just use that...

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Muhahaha! Well done, straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you let me do it, he'd be executed in a flash! Come on, Lord Queen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Munch Munch

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chew chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew Chew

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And how would that be at all exciting?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Time and numbers! Those are the only things that matter in a battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GIMME MORE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many bowls of Oshiruko have you had already?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You idiot! Oshiruko is like oxygen for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I've brought a ton with me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And nobody else gets any! It's my favorite:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Alright! Next!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wano Country Ringo Bandit Bridge

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Do not lie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How could you have met Ryuuma?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The soul of someone else was in his body, but, well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Impossible! Ryuuma the Samurai lived and died hundreds of years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An unparalleled swordsman, a man who settled all his matches with a single flash of his blade!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A fool like you could never know of the value of the meitou Shusui!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
